LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND A SEPERATE PROPOSED CONSENT JUDGMENT. calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and a seperate proposed consent judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2024 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-08-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2023 Set For Trial On Oct-28-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
